title: Death Lightning
description: Summons a dramatic lightning strike effect when a player dies, using lightning visuals and sounds only — no fire, no explosions, and no damage.
body:
## Death Lightning (Visual Only)

Adds a lightning-themed visual and sound effect when a player dies, played at the death location.  
The effect is implemented using particles and sounds only and does not summon a lightning entity.

No fire, explosions, or damage are produced, and no gameplay mechanics are altered.

This datapack can be used on SMPs to provide a visible and audible indication when a player death occurs nearby.

Tested in **singleplayer** on **Minecraft Java 1.21.11**.  
Expected to function on other **1.21.x** versions and in **multiplayer**, but these have not been explicitly tested.
